relevanceReason: neurology; central nervous system; cerebrospinal; neuroscience term
abstractSnippet: When I was requested by your secretary to read a paper before this Section it occurred to me that it might be a fitting opportunity to familiarize neurologists with the classification of diseases of the optic nerve as used by ophthalmologists, and to attempt to elucidate, in a measure, the significance of changes in these structures in connection with diseases of the central nervous system.
